profile.name: Jon Snow
profile.currentTitle: Former King in the North & Lord Commander
profile.location: The True North, Beyond the Wall
profile.summary: Rose from bastard of Winterfell to King in the North through merit, not birthright. Youngest Lord Commander in Night's Watch history. United wildlings and Northerners against an existential threat when centuries of hatred said it was impossible. Led the defense of humanity at the Battle of Winterfell. Chose duty over ambition at every turn — the rarest leadership quality in Westeros.

evidence.outcome: Commanded the defense of Castle Black against a 100,000-strong wildling assault with fewer than 100 defenders
evidence.description: Commanded the defense of Castle Black against a 100,000-strong wildling assault with fewer than 100 defenders

evidence.outcome: Led the coalition defense at the Battle of Winterfell against the Army of the Dead
evidence.description: Led the coalition defense at the Battle of Winterfell against the Army of the Dead

evidence.outcome: Made the decision to execute Daenerys Targaryen to prevent further mass casualties — accepting personal consequences
evidence.description: Made the decision to execute Daenerys Targaryen to prevent further mass casualties — accepting personal consequences

evidence.outcome: United the Night's Watch and Free Folk — ending thousands of years of hostility — to face the White Walker threat
evidence.description: United the Night's Watch and Free Folk — ending thousands of years of hostility — to face the White Walker threat

evidence.outcome: Convinced Northern lords to rally behind Stark banners after the Bolton occupation of Winterfell
evidence.description: Convinced Northern lords to rally behind Stark banners after the Bolton occupation of Winterfell

evidence.outcome: Built alliance between the North and Daenerys Targaryen's forces despite deep cultural mistrust
evidence.description: Built alliance between the North and Daenerys Targaryen's forces despite deep cultural mistrust

evidence.outcome: Led tactical defense of Castle Black's southern gate against Thenn and wildling raiders
evidence.description: Led tactical defense of Castle Black's southern gate against Thenn and wildling raiders

evidence.outcome: Commanded the Battle of the Bastards — adapted from near-defeat to victory through battlefield improvisation
evidence.description: Commanded the Battle of the Bastards — adapted from near-defeat to victory through battlefield improvisation

evidence.outcome: Planned and executed the expedition beyond the Wall to capture a wight as proof of the existential threat
evidence.description: Planned and executed the expedition beyond the Wall to capture a wight as proof of the existential threat

evidence.outcome: Defeated the White Walker at Hardhome in single combat using Valyrian steel
evidence.description: Defeated the White Walker at Hardhome in single combat using Valyrian steel

evidence.outcome: Survived the Battle of the Bastards through exceptional personal combat against overwhelming odds
evidence.description: Survived the Battle of the Bastards through exceptional personal combat against overwhelming odds

evidence.outcome: Trained from childhood by Ser Rodrik Cassel and the master-at-arms of Winterfell
evidence.description: Trained from childhood by Ser Rodrik Cassel and the master-at-arms of Winterfell

evidence.outcome: Survived extended operations beyond the Wall in extreme cold, hostile territory, and limited supplies
evidence.description: Survived extended operations beyond the Wall in extreme cold, hostile territory, and limited supplies

evidence.outcome: Infiltrated wildling society for intelligence gathering — maintaining cover for months
evidence.description: Infiltrated wildling society for intelligence gathering — maintaining cover for months

evidence.outcome: Survived literal death and resurrection — ultimate proof of resilience under pressure
evidence.description: Survived literal death and resurrection — ultimate proof of resilience under pressure

evidence.outcome: Made the unpopular decision to allow wildlings through the Wall — prioritizing long-term survival over short-term politics
evidence.description: Made the unpopular decision to allow wildlings through the Wall — prioritizing long-term survival over short-term politics

evidence.outcome: Chose to bend the knee to Daenerys to secure dragon support against the Night King — sacrificing title for mission
evidence.description: Chose to bend the knee to Daenerys to secure dragon support against the Night King — sacrificing title for mission

evidence.outcome: Decided to prioritize the existential threat of the White Walkers over the political game of thrones
evidence.description: Decided to prioritize the existential threat of the White Walkers over the political game of thrones

evidence.outcome: Inspired loyalty from the Night's Watch, wildlings, and Northern lords through personal courage and integrity
evidence.description: Inspired loyalty from the Night's Watch, wildlings, and Northern lords through personal courage and integrity

evidence.outcome: Led from the front in every battle — earning respect through shared risk rather than command from safety
evidence.description: Led from the front in every battle — earning respect through shared risk rather than command from safety

evidence.outcome: Elected Lord Commander and later proclaimed King in the North by popular acclaim — not hereditary right
evidence.description: Elected Lord Commander and later proclaimed King in the North by popular acclaim — not hereditary right

evidence.outcome: Conducted deep-cover intelligence operation within Mance Rayder's wildling army
evidence.description: Conducted deep-cover intelligence operation within Mance Rayder's wildling army

evidence.outcome: Gathered critical intelligence on wildling military strength, tactics, and planned attack routes
evidence.description: Gathered critical intelligence on wildling military strength, tactics, and planned attack routes

evidence.outcome: Operated as double agent while maintaining ethical boundaries — refused to kill innocent civilians to maintain cover
evidence.description: Operated as double agent while maintaining ethical boundaries — refused to kill innocent civilians to maintain cover

evidence.outcome: Negotiated alliance with Tormund Giantsbane and the Free Folk at Hardhome
evidence.description: Negotiated alliance with Tormund Giantsbane and the Free Folk at Hardhome

evidence.outcome: Persuaded Daenerys Targaryen to commit her forces north against the White Walkers
evidence.description: Persuaded Daenerys Targaryen to commit her forces north against the White Walkers

evidence.outcome: Negotiated with Cersei Lannister at the Dragonpit — presenting evidence of the undead threat to hostile audience
evidence.description: Negotiated with Cersei Lannister at the Dragonpit — presenting evidence of the undead threat to hostile audience

evidence.outcome: Mentored Olly, Satin, and other young Night's Watch recruits
evidence.description: Mentored Olly, Satin, and other young Night's Watch recruits

evidence.outcome: Developed leadership capabilities in Tormund, Edd Tollett, and other field commanders
evidence.description: Developed leadership capabilities in Tormund, Edd Tollett, and other field commanders

evidence.outcome: Recognized talent in Samwell Tarly — sending him to the Citadel to train as maester despite resistance
evidence.description: Recognized talent in Samwell Tarly — sending him to the Citadel to train as maester despite resistance

evidence.outcome: Consistently chose the harder right over the easier wrong — including executing a child who betrayed him
evidence.description: Consistently chose the harder right over the easier wrong — including executing a child who betrayed him

evidence.outcome: Refused to claim the Iron Throne despite having the strongest hereditary claim as Aegon Targaryen
evidence.description: Refused to claim the Iron Throne despite having the strongest hereditary claim as Aegon Targaryen

evidence.outcome: Accepted exile rather than pursue personal power after killing Daenerys
evidence.description: Accepted exile rather than pursue personal power after killing Daenerys

evidence.outcome: Conducted military operations in extreme arctic conditions beyond the Wall for extended periods
evidence.description: Conducted military operations in extreme arctic conditions beyond the Wall for extended periods

evidence.outcome: Led the expedition to capture a wight in blizzard conditions with a small team against undead forces
evidence.description: Led the expedition to capture a wight in blizzard conditions with a small team against undead forces

evidence.outcome: Survived exposure, combat injuries, and hypothermia during the frozen lake engagement north of the Wall
evidence.description: Survived exposure, combat injuries, and hypothermia during the frozen lake engagement north of the Wall

evidence.outcome: Adapted Battle of the Bastards strategy in real-time when Rickon's death collapsed the original plan
evidence.description: Adapted Battle of the Bastards strategy in real-time when Rickon's death collapsed the original plan

evidence.outcome: Adjusted defensive positions at Winterfell as the Night King's forces broke through initial lines
evidence.description: Adjusted defensive positions at Winterfell as the Night King's forces broke through initial lines

evidence.outcome: Pivoted from conventional military thinking to unconventional coalition-building when facing supernatural threat
evidence.description: Pivoted from conventional military thinking to unconventional coalition-building when facing supernatural threat

evidence.outcome: Earned respect within wildling culture by understanding their values and meeting them as equals
evidence.description: Earned respect within wildling culture by understanding their values and meeting them as equals

evidence.outcome: Bridged the cultural divide between the disciplined Night's Watch and the freedom-loving Free Folk
evidence.description: Bridged the cultural divide between the disciplined Night's Watch and the freedom-loving Free Folk

evidence.outcome: Navigated the cultural expectations of Northern lords, Dothraki warriors, and Unsullied soldiers simultaneously
evidence.description: Navigated the cultural expectations of Northern lords, Dothraki warriors, and Unsullied soldiers simultaneously

evidence.outcome: Commanded Castle Black as Lord Commander — managing personnel, supplies, and defenses
evidence.description: Commanded Castle Black as Lord Commander — managing personnel, supplies, and defenses

evidence.outcome: Organized the Night's Watch during a period of catastrophic losses and declining recruitment
evidence.description: Organized the Night's Watch during a period of catastrophic losses and declining recruitment

evidence.outcome: Managed the integration of wildling refugees into Castle Black's operations and supply systems
evidence.description: Managed the integration of wildling refugees into Castle Black's operations and supply systems

evidence.outcome: Conducted long-range reconnaissance missions beyond the Wall including the Fist of the First Men
evidence.description: Conducted long-range reconnaissance missions beyond the Wall including the Fist of the First Men

evidence.outcome: Led the ranging to Hardhome that provided critical intelligence on White Walker capabilities
evidence.description: Led the ranging to Hardhome that provided critical intelligence on White Walker capabilities

evidence.outcome: Scouted enemy positions and terrain during the Battle of the Bastards and the Battle of Winterfell
evidence.description: Scouted enemy positions and terrain during the Battle of the Bastards and the Battle of Winterfell

evidence.outcome: Stood alone against majority opinion to save the wildlings — and was murdered for it
evidence.description: Stood alone against majority opinion to save the wildlings — and was murdered for it

evidence.outcome: Told Daenerys Targaryen the truth about his parentage despite knowing the political consequences
evidence.description: Told Daenerys Targaryen the truth about his parentage despite knowing the political consequences

evidence.outcome: Killed the woman he loved to save millions — bearing the weight alone rather than seeking justification
evidence.description: Killed the woman he loved to save millions — bearing the weight alone rather than seeking justification

purpose: To protect those who cannot protect themselves — regardless of what it costs, regardless of what others think, and regardless of what he stands to gain.

workHistory.title: Leader of the Free Folk
workHistory.company: The True North — Beyond the Wall
workHistory.description: Voluntarily exiled to the True North. Leads wildling communities in rebuilding beyond the Wall. Chose service over sovereignty.

workHistory.title: King in the North
workHistory.description: Proclaimed King by the Northern lords after liberating Winterfell. Built the Northern alliance that fought the Army of the Dead. Bent the knee to Daenerys to secure dragon support for the existential fight.

workHistory.title: Lord Commander of the Night's Watch
workHistory.description: Youngest Lord Commander in Night's Watch history. Made the controversial decision to allow wildlings through the Wall. Assassinated by his own men, resurrected, and continued command.

workHistory.title: Ranger & Intelligence Operative
workHistory.description: Night's Watch ranger conducting operations beyond the Wall. Infiltrated Mance Rayder's wildling army as deep-cover intelligence operative. Gathered critical military intelligence.

workHistory.title: Recruit & Steward
workHistory.description: Volunteered for the Night's Watch. Top recruit in combat training. Assigned as steward to Lord Commander Mormont — receiving mentorship in command and strategy.
